ddls:
CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., N, S) */,
  "use_type" TEXT /* Indicates the use of the attribute (e.g., D, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the attribute represents */,
  "linked_sections" TEXT /* Links or references to relevant documentation sections */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute */,
  "valid_range" TEXT /* Valid range for the attribute values */,
  "attribute_group" TEXT /* Grouping attribute for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* The name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., observational, simulated) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the dataset */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the dataset is updated */,
  "geospatial_extent" TEXT /* Geospatial extent of the dataset (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "temporal_extent" TEXT /* Temporal extent of the dataset (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute defining the variable */,
  "is_scalar" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is scalar (single-valued) or not */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variable */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., required, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset (if applicable) */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute (if applicable) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Number of the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being accessed */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar type */,
  "calendar_name" TEXT /* Name of the calendar (e.g., Gregorian, Julian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calendar */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the calendar */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the calendar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bounds" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary variable */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated variable */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of the boundary (e.g., lower, upper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boundary variable */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the boundary */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounds_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axis_definitions" (
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each axis definition */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated variable */,
  "axis_type" TEXT /* Type of the axis (e.g., x, y, z) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the axis */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the axis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("axis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_axis_definitions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offsets" (
  "offset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offset */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated variable */,
  "offset_value" REAL /* Value of the offset */,
  "offset_type" TEXT /* Type of the offset (e.g., add, subtract) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offsets_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)
